subject: Create sources/LICENSE_AUDIT.md for Islamic text sources
description: Create a single audit doc capturing candidate Islamic text sources and their license status (SAFE/RESTRICTED/UNKNOWN). Must include Tanzil.net Quran text license research plus major translation license research. For each source: source_id, status, license_url, attribution_text, rights_holder, and any redistribution requirements. Identify at least 2-3 SAFE sources suitable for MVP fixtures; do not mark uncertain sources SAFE. Verification: ensure file exists, lsp_diagnostics clean for new md file; build not applicable for docs-only repo.
